# Nicolas Cossu

> Nicolas Cossu is a Data Engineer (at Luno) and Forward Deployed Engineer based in Buenos Aires, Argentina. He builds, owns and ships production data systems end to end — ETL pipelines, cloud architecture and the product on top — and leads delivery as a team leader and project manager. Background in data science and data analytics.

Canonical site: https://nicolasalejandrocossu.github.io

## Roles (in priority order)

1. Data Engineer
2. Forward Deployed Engineer
3. Team Leader
4. Project Manager
5. Data Scientist
6. Data Analyst

## Profile

- Name: Nicolas Cossu (Nicolas Alejandro Cossu)
- Location: Buenos Aires, Argentina
- Current role: Semi-Senior Data Engineer at Luno (since April 2025)
- Founder & engineer at Exos, a software studio for Argentine SMBs
- Languages: Spanish (native), English (EF SET certified)
- Open to: Forward Deployed Engineer, Data Engineer, Project Manager and Team Lead roles

## Core expertise

- Data engineering: ETL/ELT pipelines, data warehousing, high-volume and high-concurrency systems
- Stack: Python, SQL, Snowflake, Apache Airflow, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis
- Cloud: AWS, Google Cloud Platform, Microsoft Azure; CI/CD, REST APIs, multi-tenant architecture
- Adjacent: data science, data analytics, Pandas, NumPy, Tableau, AI agents and AI workflows, IoT
- Leadership: technical leadership, project management, end-to-end software delivery

## Proof points

- Migrated 70,000+ users from a legacy system to a modern one in production with zero disruption (single 10+ hour run)
- Engineered platforms built to hold 100,000+ active users
- Wrote and won a technical proposal for a key client, then designed its cloud infrastructure from scratch
- Owned CongressIA, a national-scale medical-congress platform, end to end (leadership, architecture, backend, infrastructure)
- Co-founded Exos and ships validated multi-tenant systems and bespoke platforms

## Education & credentials

- Harvard CS50: Introduction to Programming with Python; Introduction to Databases with SQL
- IBM Data Science track: Introduction to Data Science, Data Science Methodology, Data Science Tools
- Electronics Technician Degree, San Vicente Technical School (top student / flag-bearer, 9.45 GPA)
- EF SET English Certificate
- Siemens LOGO! national contest recognition; Pedro B. Palacios National Award
